column1:
style-at-import-external,@import of an external stylesheet. Triggers a CSP violation and must be stripped by sanitizeCss before the rule reaches the page . The safe sibling `.target { color: red }` rule must survive (partial-survival — same shape as style-url-javascript and style-moz-binding).,The .target paragraph renders red (the sibling rule survives sanitization). The @import line is silently dropped — no network request to attacker.example fires.,"

","@import url('https://attacker.example/evil.css')
